PII_IN_LOGS.title: Security of personal information
PII_IN_LOGS.requirement: Take reasonable steps to protect personal information from misuse, interference, loss, and unauthorised access, modification, or disclosure.
PII_IN_LOGS.max_penalty: For serious or repeated interferences with privacy: up to AUD 50,000,000, 3x benefit, or 30% adjusted turnover for a body corporate; AUD 2,500,000 for an individual.

API_OVEREXPOSURE.title: Collection, use, and disclosure of personal information
API_OVEREXPOSURE.requirement: Collect only reasonably necessary personal information and use or disclose it only for permitted purposes.
API_OVEREXPOSURE.max_penalty: For serious or repeated interferences with privacy: up to AUD 50,000,000, 3x benefit, or 30% adjusted turnover for a body corporate; AUD 2,500,000 for an individual.

PII_OVEREXPOSED_IN_RESPONSE.title: Collection, use, and disclosure of personal information
PII_OVEREXPOSED_IN_RESPONSE.requirement: Collect only reasonably necessary personal information and use or disclose it only for permitted purposes.
PII_OVEREXPOSED_IN_RESPONSE.max_penalty: For serious or repeated interferences with privacy: up to AUD 50,000,000, 3x benefit, or 30% adjusted turnover for a body corporate; AUD 2,500,000 for an individual.

MISSING_AUTH.title: Security of personal information
MISSING_AUTH.requirement: Take reasonable technical and organisational steps to prevent unauthorised access or disclosure of personal information.
MISSING_AUTH.max_penalty: For serious or repeated interferences with privacy: up to AUD 50,000,000, 3x benefit, or 30% adjusted turnover for a body corporate; AUD 2,500,000 for an individual.

THIRD_PARTY_PII_WITHOUT_CONSENT.title: Use or disclosure of personal information
THIRD_PARTY_PII_WITHOUT_CONSENT.requirement: Use or disclose personal information for a secondary purpose only with consent or another permitted basis.
THIRD_PARTY_PII_WITHOUT_CONSENT.max_penalty: For serious or repeated interferences with privacy: up to AUD 50,000,000, 3x benefit, or 30% adjusted turnover for a body corporate; AUD 2,500,000 for an individual.

STACK_TRACE_LEAKAGE.title: Security of personal information
STACK_TRACE_LEAKAGE.requirement: Take reasonable steps to prevent unauthorised disclosure through error responses or diagnostic output.
STACK_TRACE_LEAKAGE.max_penalty: For serious or repeated interferences with privacy: up to AUD 50,000,000, 3x benefit, or 30% adjusted turnover for a body corporate; AUD 2,500,000 for an individual.

ERROR_DISCLOSURE.title: Security of personal information
ERROR_DISCLOSURE.requirement: Take reasonable steps to prevent unauthorised disclosure through error responses or diagnostic output.
ERROR_DISCLOSURE.max_penalty: For serious or repeated interferences with privacy: up to AUD 50,000,000, 3x benefit, or 30% adjusted turnover for a body corporate; AUD 2,500,000 for an individual.

MISSING_RETENTION_POLICY.title: Destroy or de-identify unneeded personal information
MISSING_RETENTION_POLICY.requirement: Take reasonable steps to destroy or de-identify personal information once it is no longer needed, unless retention is legally required.
MISSING_RETENTION_POLICY.max_penalty: For serious or repeated interferences with privacy: up to AUD 50,000,000, 3x benefit, or 30% adjusted turnover for a body corporate; AUD 2,500,000 for an individual.

MISSING_RETENTION_BOUNDARY.title: Destroy or de-identify unneeded personal information
MISSING_RETENTION_BOUNDARY.requirement: Take reasonable steps to destroy or de-identify personal information once it is no longer needed, unless retention is legally required.
MISSING_RETENTION_BOUNDARY.max_penalty: For serious or repeated interferences with privacy: up to AUD 50,000,000, 3x benefit, or 30% adjusted turnover for a body corporate; AUD 2,500,000 for an individual.

PERMISSIVE_CORS.title: Security of personal information
PERMISSIVE_CORS.requirement: Take reasonable technical steps to reduce unauthorised access or disclosure risk.
PERMISSIVE_CORS.max_penalty: For serious or repeated interferences with privacy: up to AUD 50,000,000, 3x benefit, or 30% adjusted turnover for a body corporate; AUD 2,500,000 for an individual.

HARDCODED_SECRET.title: Security of personal information
HARDCODED_SECRET.requirement: Take reasonable steps to protect systems and credentials that secure personal information.
HARDCODED_SECRET.max_penalty: For serious or repeated interferences with privacy: up to AUD 50,000,000, 3x benefit, or 30% adjusted turnover for a body corporate; AUD 2,500,000 for an individual.

SQL_INJECTION.title: Security of personal information
SQL_INJECTION.requirement: Take reasonable steps to protect personal information from unauthorised access, modification, or disclosure.
SQL_INJECTION.max_penalty: For serious or repeated interferences with privacy: up to AUD 50,000,000, 3x benefit, or 30% adjusted turnover for a body corporate; AUD 2,500,000 for an individual.

PLAINTEXT_PASSWORD_STORAGE.title: Security of personal information
PLAINTEXT_PASSWORD_STORAGE.requirement: Take reasonable steps to secure credentials and protect personal information from unauthorised access.
PLAINTEXT_PASSWORD_STORAGE.max_penalty: For serious or repeated interferences with privacy: up to AUD 50,000,000, 3x benefit, or 30% adjusted turnover for a body corporate; AUD 2,500,000 for an individual.
